column1: # .zap/rules.tsv — OWASP ZAP rule overrides for Plan 11-07
# Levels: IGNORE | WARN | FAIL (default behaviour for unmentioned rules: from baseline action)
#   10038  CSP not enforced — D-08 Stage 1 emits Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only by design
#                              for the first 14 days post-launch. This rule MUST be flipped back
#                              to default (FAIL) once CSP_ENFORCING=true is rolled out (Stage 2).
#   10063  Permissions-Policy not set on test endpoints (acceptable on localhost ZAP target)
#   10202  Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens — public POST endpoints (csp-report, rum, contact) are
#                              not state-changing in a CSRF-exploitable way; these are public
#                              ingestion sinks for anonymous browser telemetry.

column3: CSP not enforced (D-08 Stage 1 Report-Only by design — Plan 11-07)
Permissions-Policy not set on local ZAP target endpoints
Absence of CSRF tokens on public ingestion endpoints (csp-report, rum)
